author: Joel M.
pros: We are trying to go IT lite on a solution to help complex, distributed teams. We have been trailing Kintone as a solution that will allows many team leads create and manage projects and workflows. The low-code aspect of creation is the most compelling aspect we have found.
cons: Pricing is a bit of a challenge to quickly understand after 5 users, you move into enterprise and you have to call to get an estimate even though they say you'll save money with their ROI tool. Could be more transparent.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I have accurate reports, solid information and feel confident in my presentations because of the ability to have reports at my fingertips.
author: Tara J.
pros: I love that Kintone allows me to retrieve our data in an easy to understand way. I can pull reports, manipulate them and present the data easily.
cons: I wish it were a bit more flexible in regards to searching for information.

author: Ru K.
pros: It can assign someone with a certain task, and it's easy to create some easy apps.
cons: It cannot do certain things like anker link. It is very inconvenient that it cannot do something easy like this.

review_title: Great Value and Easy to Use
description: Great, customer support has been easy to use and the staff is very knowledgable about the product.
author: Russell B.
pros: Kintone is easy to customize without coding knowledge and offers almost all of the functionality of products that are 5x as expensive.
cons: Integrations with other programs need to be refined and the ability to reverse a step in the process management system would be really helpful.

description: We have automated our quoting process, our freight shipping process, our purchasing process, and many other procedures with Kintone. If there's a problem, chances are, we can fix it with Kintone.
author: Ben C.
pros: I love the custom nature of the software and the ability to customize every app with JavaScript. Offbeat Press is a custom screen printing company so everything we do is custom and we need a software that can keep up with all of our custom needs. Kintone does that.
cons: If you don't have experience with JavaScript, it can become a little more expensive for various add-ons, but not much. And, at the end of the day, that's not a con against Kintone. It's a con against whoever is building the apps.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Mary Kaye W.
pros: Love the use of plug-ins and modular programming. As a former Sr. Sys. Analyst in the utility industry, I was impressed with the ease of use of the Kintone product and the ability to come up to speed to develop a useful program.
cons: Did not find any negatives. Looking forward to the evolution of our software.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Reunaldo P.
pros: The best thing about Kintone, in my opinion, is its user-friendly interface and the ability to easily customize the platform to meet specific needs. The ability to quickly create custom forms and reports is also very useful. Furthermore, kintone's integration with other services such as Google Apps, Salesforce, and Dropbox makes it incredibly powerful and simple to use.
cons: Kintone's user interface can be difficult to use and understand at times, in my opinion. It also didn't have a lot of customization options, making it difficult to tailor it to my specific needs.

review_title: The revolutionary tool that changed the way I manage my data and collaborate as a team.
description: I really like the drag and drop capabilities that allowed me to create and customize my own database applications without the need for prior programming knowledge.
author: Andrea Yarlyn Q.
pros: It's great, it allows me to centralize all my information in one place which made collaboration and project management much easier.
cons: There are some specific features or settings that I would like to be able to modify or adapt to further suit my needs and work processes.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Increase your productivity and transform your workflows
description: My experience is very positive. The platform has given me the flexibility and ability to build and customize apps without any programming knowledge. I can tailor my workflows to my specific needs and streamline my processes for greater efficiency.
author: Juan Carlos E.
pros: What I like the most is its ease of use and its ability to customize and adapt applications without having any programming knowledge. I can create and modify workflows according to my specific needs.
cons: One of the things that I did not like very much was the limitation in terms of the ability to customize the design of the applications. Although I can customize the fields and workflows, I would like more customization options in terms of appearance and aesthetic design.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: David H.
pros: It is a good alternative that incorporates simple to use and very efficient tools. It has the drag and drop tool that speeds up the creative process without code. It allows the development of an ideal database to track our customers and web forms. Creating simple and personalized applications is very simple and necessary to process time in the office.
cons: The only thing I have noticed is that its user interface can be more visually pleasing.

description: We spent a lot of time developing, tying to get our apps all set before we dove in. We just started to use it and it is so much easier than our old systems. Thank you Kintone!
author: Bobbie Sue W.
pros: We were doing our case management remotely with Microsoft office products, which was time consuming and challenging when server issues prevented access. Kintone is great! It is easy to use, so customizable, has great features and they are constantly adding more plug ins and connections. We can connect to outside programs and we can move around fields and create apps for pretty much whatever we need. There is great support in setting up apps and learning the ways to develop Kintone to how you want it. We have requested some complicated connections and feature set ups to make our work easier and our Kintone support team has risen to the challenge. Better yet, the functonality is easy enough for a non-tech person to be able to learn how to build apps, add plug-ins and more. No more waiting for an outside tech person to add a field i need now. I can do it! Also, it was wonderful not to have our contacts pressuring us trying to UP-SELL and add on more costs and services. We are a small non-profit without a big budget for the case management system, and thankfully the Kintone team is trying to help us work with our needs while being sensitive to our cost restraints.
cons: There are many different outside programs we use that we can connect (yay), but the cost of getting someone to code the connection is a difficult upfront cost to afford. Had to pick and choose what was most important.

description: Overall, I have been able to make Kintone work for my application. There have been some frustrating workarounds that have been required due to Kintone limitations, but it works.
author: Kate S.
pros: I am most appreciative of the Kintone's support staff. I am extremely impressed with response time, knowledgeability, professionalism, and willingness to help that I have experienced when working with all levels of support, but most notably,[sensitive content hidden]. [sensitive content hidden] is always quick to respond to my requests for assistance, and always willing to go the extra mile to make sure my Kintone application is meeting all my company's needs.
cons: I am frequently frustrated by the narrow definition of what constitutes uniqueness in Kintone. The fact that I cannot define a unique record across multiple fields boggles my mind. In my opinion, that is a basic tenet of any database platform. And beyond that, I have had to jump through hoops to make sure that my unique values don't occur within other records. Very frustrating, indeed.

review_title: Enhance your team collaborations & save your time!
description: It's just so great! We used to ask constantly to other members where the documents were filed and trying to look back at our last quote, last project, last shipping documents, etc.
author: Shin K.
pros: Ease of use, coming up and making our own apps.
cons: It can't email documents from the app.

description: Transitioned a complex database with many "many to many" relationships which don't seem to something the designers at Kintone make a priority but thanks to experts and determined support from the team, we've figured most things out. We have a lot of work to do yet and it can feel daunting but thanks to the support, it is doable.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The support. Figuring things out wasn't intuitive for me and without the support team, I'd likely not have seen the transition through. The team was unbelievably patient and kind and smart about ensuring we didn't get it fast...but correct. Support team truly was the best value and made all the difference in the world.
cons: Challenging to use and learn. Lack of comprehensive tutorials. I would always search first for help but only found very basic guidance which made me feel terrible for always having to turn to support team to figure things out. The product is great if you are very tech savvy and have advanced skills... or if you have the team for support. But if we had to go this alone, we'd never have endured.

review_title: Kintone is ideal for people who are looking for highly customizable platform.
description: In general, I have been very happy using Kintone, I have built a variety of customized solutions using Kintone and I am hoping to do more.
author: Leo L.
pros: Flexibility is what I love about Kintone. It has core features needed to handle many type of workflow in many industries. For those that are looking for more, It is also very easy to implement additional functionality and work with API from other system.
cons: The UI really could use some work. As far as I think the UX is great, UI is struggling to hit good impressions.

description: Our firm has been more organized and our work product is more streamlined. Deadlines don't get missed and we love that the software keeps track of the changes made, as well as who made them.
author: Pamela T.
pros: This program is easily customizable. Perfect for keeping our team on task and preventing them from missing critical dates and response deadlines.
cons: I can't think of anything I dislike about this software.

author: Toshiyuki T.
pros: Workflow process management, auto-notification, detailed level setting of permissions
cons: Project management feature is not strong enough.

description: TONS. We originally started using Kintone to develop a Supplier Portal for our international suppliers. This is currently in use. We are now working to develop a portal for our design and sales department - housing the core processes of our custom manufacturing operation.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's flexibility, ease-up use, and because I'm a database nerd - the database on the back-end is setup exceptionally well. EXCELLENT, EXCELLENT structure and overall product.
cons: There really isn't anything to NOT like about this software. I do see some areas of potential however - for instance - maybe adding a matrix feature in the app dev part. But nothing to complain of.

description: Kintone is very Powerful Software to handle multiple projects at same time. It solves all my problems of task managing and time distribution with the team. It also help me to improve my productivity to deliver my projects in time.
author: Vaibhav V.
pros: kintone is very impressive tool for handling multiple projects with it's rich features like task management, progress tracking, reporting, etc. It's very easy to use and offers great UI for all users.
cons: As I use Project Management Feature of the tool, It's difficult to finds issues with the other features. Personally, I haven't face any issue to manage multiple projects with my team.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Kintone saved the day when I couldn't find any service that fit my business.
description: Overall, we love this program. It's currently used by 10 folks but will be used wider soon!
author: Grace D.
pros: Customer service! They respond within hours and are always free to meet with me when I have a new request on ways to customize the platform to fit my specific business' needs.
cons: When filtering by a piece of data that contains letters, you have to ensure all data that is entered is done exactly the same (even with capitalization) or you will miss data. It would be great for the program to pick up all data despite this. Ex. Addresses are entered by my team and might say "630 S San Pedro" while others say "630 san pedro".

author: Mikiko O.
pros: Kintone's the best software I've seen in replacing excel spreadsheet forms and entering information when there's multiple data for 1 main item.
cons: It's difficult to set up notifications and color coding

review_title: Easy to use no code database platform for a nonprofit. We use it to track services and share data.
description: Easy to set up and share information. Being abe to attach files to records is great. Best are the analytics - other online databases we used did not crealize charts or pivot tables. Exportability. We are able to share data and staff can use the easy tools to create their own reports.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Analysis capacity. I can create pivot tables and sumary reports easily. Allows our staff to look at data without relying on Evaluation or tech department support
cons: Nothing really. Only things I would like would be ability to run video files and preview all file attachments in the site, not just download to view.

author: Yumiko Y.
pros: Kintone is extremely easy to learn and use. Each application is customizable so that is extremely useful too.
cons: I think the overall look of the software may be a bit outdated but there is nothing about the performance that I would say is a "con".

author: Jassem C.
pros: It is easy to use. The apps were amazing. We are in the process of replicating our workflow from a spreadsheet to Kintone.
cons: More integration to e-commerce platforms and inboxes.

author: Celynna C.
pros: creating a platform thats is user friendly, and easy to create
cons: Plug-ins it was hard to determine what was the appropriate plug-in that i would need.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
